author: jih2nn
content:
After thinking about this for some time, I came to think that this is for mandatory proofs, rather than BiB. Fowarding my [comment](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/issues/5076#issuecomment-4225647113) here:

> I came to think that deprecating envelop and adding `NewPayloadRequestHeader` are for mandatory proofs, rather than BiB. BiB doesn't have to have these but mandatory proofs are. BiB can stay focus on putting payload data into blobs and verifying the availability of payload blobs via sampling. I'm curious to learn what people think.

How does it sound? We can discuss here or in that Github issue.
